prestazioni: Engine swap to a **K14C BoosterJet** (1.4L turbocharged, direct-injection, 140 HP stock) with a **Garrett GT2259S** turbo upgrade, paired with a **HKS Super SQV4** blow-off valve and **Toda Racing** forged pistons (8.5:1 compression for E85 compatibility).

Full **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management with **AEM X-Series** wideband O2 sensor and **Injector Dynamics ID1000** fuel injectors, tuned for 220 HP on **E85** with a **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller targeting 1.2 bar (17.4 psi).

Custom **Suzuki Sport** 4-2-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold with a **MagnaFlow 11379** cat-back system (2.5" piping, resonated mid-pipe) and **APR GTC-200** intercooler upgrade (20% larger core, 40% efficiency gain).
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3** widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front splitter, and rear diffuser) with **Work Emotion CR Kiwami** 18x9.5" wheels (+20 offset) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** (245/40R18).

**Seibon Carbon** hood (vented, 30% weight reduction) and **VIS Racing** carbon fiber side skirts, paired with a **Sparco Assetto Gara** roll cage (bolt-in, 4-point) and **Bride Zeta III** bucket seats (FIA-approved).

**Osram Night Breaker Laser** HID headlights (6000K) with **Morimoto XB LED** fog lights, **Vland** sequential LED taillights, and a **JDM-spec** **Suzuki Sport** rear spoiler (carbon fiber, 3-position adjustable).
